arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher predicts West Ham v Arsenal scoreline
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher expects West Ham to slump to a 2-0 home defeat against Arsenal on Saturday. The Hammers welcome the Gunners to the London Stadium... The post Jamie Carragher predicts West Ham v Arsenal scoreline appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to sign 'absolute superstar' to help win Premier League title
arts.sum: Arsenal have been told they "need" to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid in the January transfer window to help them win the Premier League title . Speaking to PrimeCasino, Petit said: "Arsenal need to sign Rodrygo from Real Madrid as he’s so underrated and gets overshadowed by Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Jr.

arts.ttl: Arsenal in 'advanced talks' to make most important signing of January transfer window
arts.sum: Roberto Olabe will be leaving his role at Real Sociedad in the summer and a deal could be done very soon to see him arrive at the Emirates Stadium as Edu's replacement. Arsenal may not be hugely busy in the January transfer window .

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal's January & summer transfer plans revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer plans for January and summer 2025 have been revealed.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: How Arsenal now feel about signing Viktor Gyokeres after he failed to score against them in midweek
arts.sum: The big Swede failed his audition in midweek...

arts.ttl: Arteta provides vague Gabriel injury update ahead of Premier League clash against West Ham
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta provides an update on Gabriel Magalhaes' fitness ahead of Arsenal's crucial Premier League encounter with West Ham United this weekend.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs West Ham - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting how Arsenal could line up against West Ham in the Premier League on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW13 predictions: Liverpool to decide title this weekend with win over Man City coupled with Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on guitarist and Aston Villa fan Harry Southerton from indie rockers Feet for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 13 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed ideal fixture advantage as Gunners try to chase down leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal have a busy period over Christmas, but unlike their potential Premier League title rivals, Liverpool and Manchester City, they won't have to travel much at all

arts.ttl: Arteta provides Gabriel fitness update ahead of West Ham contest
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has delivered a fitness update ahead of Arsenal's Premier League clash with West Ham - though he remained coy about providing too many details. Arteta provides Gabriel fitness update ahead of West Ham contest
